citations.note: The Defense Logistics Agency's Land & Maritime supply center is in the Columbus area — a documented federal supply-chain node. Columbus is a tracking candidate (epic #486).

The Joint Systems Manufacturing Center (Lima Army Tank Plant) is co-located with the Shawnee campus in Allen County. The nexus is documented geography; the causal link to the boom remains an inference (the campus authorization posture is undisclosed).
Inferred from the EV/battery supply corridor around Lordstown; no documented defense nexus yet — a watch-level signal only. Lordstown is a tracking candidate (Mahoning, #490).
The New Albany / Licking County semiconductor megasite is a documented CHIPS-program federal investment. New Albany is a tracking candidate (no SiteProfile yet, epic #485).

Springfield-Beckley Air National Guard Base is adjacent; the National Air and Space Intelligence Center (NASIC, at Wright-Patterson) is in the same corridor. Adjacency is documented; the NASIC linkage is the softer signal.
Wright-Patterson AFB sits at the Mad River terminus, adjacent to the watershed point. The base is the strongest documented federal-enclave signal in the network after Lima.

fields.operator: Hatchworks LLC (Google shell — Mountain View CA mailing, Zodiac parcels)

citations.note: Hatchworks LLC holds 11 parcels in the Zodiac assemblage (Jan-2024 + Oct-2025 acquisition tranches). Mountain View CA mailing address + entity structure consistent with a Google data-center shell. Google's primary revenue stream is consumer behavioral advertising / data analytics — consumer_surveillance is the inferred end-use. Operator principal not yet confirmed via SOS/LEI filing; tag stays inference until confirmed. See #904.

Community Reinvestment Area agreement #548-25 — a 15-year, 75% real-property tax abatement on the Shawnee Energy Campus build — is on the public record. The named counterparty behind the campus LLC remains the open question.

The operator is inferred from the New Albany hyperscaler cluster; the JobsOhio / TIF incentive stack is inferred from the regional pattern — verify each against the public record before promoting the tag past inference. Tracking candidate (epic #485).

fields.wwtp: Allen County Sanitary District (FM-1: American Bath / American II; FM-2: City of Lima)
